title: Economic evaluation of atezolizumab in combination with bevacizumab and chemotherapy for metastatic, persistent, or recurrent cervical cancer in China: A cost-effectiveness analysis.
abstract: From China's healthcare perspective, this analysis compared the cost-effectiveness of Atezolizumab in combination with Bevacizumab and chemotherapy for Metastatic, Persistent, or Recurrent Cervical Cancer.
